title: Crinkle Cream Teddy Bear - Soft Plush Toy - 10 inch / 25cm - Build your own Teddy Bear Kit with T-shirt
features: Especially for you to make at home. A lovely fluffy bear to make at home or great fun to make as a children's party activity. Then decorate the t-shirt for your bear.

Comes unstuffed with plush outer, a 50g bag of 100% recycled stuffing, wishing heart, Splodge Teddy certificate, Splodge Bear colour-in bag, white t-shirt, instructions. Stuffing is super soft, made from 100% recycled plastic bottles and manufactured in the UK.

Specially designed plush skin with pouch for easy stuffing and easy to seal fastenings - no sewing. The bear is empty of stuffing and you will need to stuff the legs, arms, head and body. Bear has CE certification.
Bear measures about 10 inches (25cm) from head to heel.
description: Product description Especially for you to make at home. A lovely cuddly bear to make at home or great fun to make as a children's party activity. Comes unstuffed with plush outer, a 50g bag of 100% recycled stuffing, wishing heart, Splodge Teddy certificate, Splodge Bear colour-in bag, white t-shirt, instructions. Stuffing is super soft, made from 100% recycled plastic bottles and manufactured in the UK. Specially designed plush skin with pouch for easy stuffing and easy to seal fastenings - no sewing. The bear is empty of stuffing and you will need to stuff the legs, arms, head and body. Bear has CE certification. Safety Warning Not suitable for children under 36 months
